About this property

Prime City Location: Home2 Suites By Hilton New York Times Square in New York offers a central position with Times Square a 4-minute walk away. Radio City Music Hall is a 6-minute stroll, while Rockefeller Center lies 1640 feet nearby. Comfortable Accommodations: Rooms feature air-conditioning, kitchenettes, and free WiFi. Additional amenities include a fitness room, 24-hour front desk, and full-day security. Dining Options: Guests can enjoy a bar and a coffee shop. A continental and American buffet breakfast is served with warm dishes, fresh pastries, and juice. Nearby Attractions: The hotel is close to the Museum of Modern Art (2297 feet) and Bryant Park (less than 0.6 mi). LaGuardia Airport is 6.8 mi away.

Couples in particular like the location – they rated it 9.6 for a two-person trip.

Highlights from high-rated reviews

K
Karen
United States
“The breakfast was very good. I like that there was variety and that every day the menu changed.”
Allison
United States
“Easy check in and luggage storage. Rooms were clean. Came with mini kitchen and a full working desk. Bed was comfortable. Shades were black out curtains. Amazing location near theaters, Rockefeller Center, and 24/7 pizza across the street.”
M
United States
“We had a wonderful view at a good price. The staff was very friendly and helpful.”
Malee
United States
“like the location place food cleanliness and walking distance to central park amd eveything”
F
Francesca
Italy
“I like the position, you can go anywhere walking, but you have also the subway near to you if you don't want walk. I like the comfort of the room, the chance to have a microwave and a fridge. I like the availability of the staff.”
A
Alba
Spain
“The location is perfect, with one or other metro line available to get anywhere you want to go. Very complete breakfast, but the most remarkable is the work done by the staff in the dining room. Inocencia and the rest of the team made our stay...”
J
Jayna
United States
“Located very conveniently, able to store bags before check in and after check out, which was really nice”
T
Tracey
United States
“Great staff customer service, location, room set up”
C
Courtney
Australia
“Location was fantastic, easy to walk places or close to the subway. Staff were very nice. Free breakfast was a nice addition too.”
Maciej
Belgium
“Never had the breakfast, put off by the prompt to come very early, no big deal.”

How are we doing?

House rules

Home2 Suites By Hilton New York Times Square takes special requests – add in the next step!
Check-in
From 4:00 PM
Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card at check-in.
You need to let the property know what time you'll be arriving in advance.
Check-out
Until 11:00 AM
Cancellation/ prepayment
Cancellation and prepayment policies vary according to accommodation type. Check what conditions apply to each option when making your selection.
Refundable damage deposit
A damage deposit of $700 is required on arrival. This will be collected by credit card. You should be reimbursed within 14 days of check-out. Your deposit will be refunded in full by credit card, subject to an inspection of the property.
Children & Beds

Child policies

Children of all ages are welcome.

Children 18 and above will be charged as adults at this property.

To see correct prices and occupancy info, add the number and ages of children in your group to your search.

Crib and extra bed policies

0 - 2 years
Crib upon request
Free

The number of cribs allowed depends on the option you choose. Check your selected option for more info.

There are no extra beds available at this property.

All cribs are subject to availability.

Age restriction
The minimum age for check-in is 21
Pets
Pets are allowed. Charges may apply.
Groups
When booking more than 8 rooms, different policies and additional fees may apply.
Cards accepted at this hotel
Cash is not accepted

The fine print

Must-know information for guests at this property

Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply.

Please inform Home2 Suites By Hilton New York Times Square of your expected arrival time in advance. You can use the Special Requests box when booking, or contact the property directly using the contact details in your confirmation.

In response to the coronavirus (COVID-19), additional safety and sanitation measures are in effect at this property.

A damage deposit of $700 is required on arrival. This will be collected by credit card. You should be reimbursed within 14 days of check-out. Your deposit will be refunded in full by credit card, subject to an inspection of the property.

FAQs about Home2 Suites By Hilton New York Times Square

Guests staying at Home2 Suites By Hilton New York Times Square can enjoy a highly-rated breakfast during their stay (guest review score: 7.4). Breakfast option(s) include:

  • Continental
  • American
  • Buffet

Room options at Home2 Suites By Hilton New York Times Square include:

  • Studio
  • Double

Check-in at Home2 Suites By Hilton New York Times Square is from 16:00, and check-out is until 11:00.

The prices at Home2 Suites By Hilton New York Times Square may vary depending on your stay (e.g. dates, hotel's policy etc.). To see prices, enter your dates.

Home2 Suites By Hilton New York Times Square offers the following activities/services (charges may apply):

  • Fitness

Home2 Suites By Hilton New York Times Square is 2,950 ft from the center of New York.
